entity.summary: Centralized crypto exchange operated by bitcastle LLC, a company registered in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.
entity.notes: Official terms identify bitcastle LLC as registered in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines. The official About page also lists an operational address in Hanoi, Vietnam.
